title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at SSC Tube South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at SSC Tube South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the SSC Tube South Asia Partners family as a Teacher in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SSC Tube South Asia Partners:
SSC Tube South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube South Asia Partners!
